title: Visualizing Gradient Descent Optimization
description: A 3D surface plot showing a convex cost function landscape with a path taken by the gradient descent algorithm from an initial point to the global minimum.
relationships: The initial point (θ₀) is at a high cost on the surface. The negative gradient vector (-∇J(θ)) points in the direction of steepest descent from the current point. A series of steps are taken, following this direction, creating a path that converges towards the global minimum (θ*), where the cost is minimized.
